codeReview.summary: The fix-readme-license feature correctly addresses the blocking issue identified in the fix-readme-accuracy review. The License section text at line 416 in README.md was changed from 'BSD-3-Clause — See [LICENSE](LICENSE)' to 'ISC — See [LICENSE](LICENSE)', matching the license field in package.json. The verification command `grep -n 'BSD-3-Clause' README.md` returns 0 results, confirming all BSD-3-Clause references have been removed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior review suggested workers should verify by checking for absence of incorrect text (grep -c 'BSD-3-Clause' should return 0). The fix-readme-license worker followed this improved verification approach, using `grep -n 'ISC\|BSD-3-Clause' README.md` which confirmed both the badge (line 5) and License section text (line 416) now show 'ISC'. This demonstrates the worker learned from the prior feedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows verification: grep -n 'ISC\|BSD-3-Clause' README.md returned both ISC occurrences correctly. The handoff also notes this verification approach.

summary: The fix-readme-license feature PASSED. It correctly addresses the blocking issue from the fix-readme-accuracy review by changing the License section text at line 416 from BSD-3-Clause to ISC, matching package.json. The fix was properly verified with grep confirming no BSD-3-Clause references remain in README.md. The worker followed the skill procedure correctly and used appropriate verification.
